sections.paragraph:
ἀπολογία, ας, ἡ [see prec.] ‘response to charges of misconduct’, defense freq. in legal context

—a. with focus on speaking in defense Ac 22:1 (legal); 1 Cor 9:3 (general sense).

—b. the act of defensive response: in a legal venue Ac 25:16; 2 Ti 4:16; general sense 2 Cor 7:11; Phil 1:7, 16; 1 Pt 3:15.
